vocabulary.translation: There is a problem with this question.
I go to school to take an exam.
The first question is very difficult.

vocabulary.example: 你知道第一题的答案吗？
vocabulary.translation: Do you know the answer to the first question?
I have already finished the exam questions.

vocabulary.pinyin: zuò cuò le liǎng dào tí

phrases.pinyin: zuò cuò le liǎng dào tí

key_sentences.chinese: 那里问题太多，问了也没用。
key_sentences.pinyin: Nà lǐ wèn tí tài duō, wèn le yě méi yòng.
key_sentences.english: There were too many questions there; asking was useless.

key_sentences.chinese: 这次考试非常难，我做错了两道题。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè cì kǎo shì fēi cháng nán, wǒ zuò cuò le liǎng dào tí.
key_sentences.english: This exam was extremely difficult; I got two questions wrong.

key_sentences.chinese: 你知道第一题的答案吗？
key_sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhī dào dì yì tí de dá àn ma?
key_sentences.english: Do you know the answer to the first question?

key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yǐ jīng zuò wán kǎo shì tí le.
key_sentences.english: I have already finished the exam questions.

key_sentences.chinese: 他把第一题的答案写对了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā bǎ dì yì tí de dá àn xiě duì le.
key_sentences.english: He wrote the answer to the first question correctly.

key_sentences.chinese: 不管怎么问，他什么都不懂。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bù guǎn zěn me wèn, tā shén me dōu bù dǒng.
key_sentences.english: No matter how you ask, he doesn't understand anything.

grammar_points.title: 疑问代词任指 — Interrogative Pronouns as Indefinites
grammar_points.explanation: In Chinese, interrogative pronouns (什么, 谁, 哪里, 怎么, etc.) can be used with 都/也 to express 'everything / everyone / everywhere / in any way'. Structure: Interrogative Pronoun + 都/也 + Verb. Example: 什么都好 (Everything is fine); 哪里都有 (It's everywhere); 谁都知道 (Everyone knows). The pronoun is no longer asking a question — it makes a universal statement.

examples.pinyin: Tā shén me dōu bù dǒng.

examples.chinese: 谁都知道这道题的答案。
examples.pinyin: Shéi dōu zhī dào zhè dào tí de dá àn.
examples.english: Everyone knows the answer to this question.

exercises.question: What does 什么都 mean in '他什么都不知道'?
Fill in: 她___都懂，非常聪明。(She understands everything; very smart.)
What does 问了也没用 mean?

grammar_points.title: 连动句 — Serial Verb Sentences
grammar_points.explanation: A serial verb sentence (连动句) has two or more verbs (or verb phrases) in sequence, sharing the same subject. The verbs occur in the logical or temporal order of the actions. Structure: Subject + Verb1 + Verb2. There is no conjunction between them. Examples: 我去图书馆借书 (I go to the library to borrow books — going is the means, borrowing is the purpose).

examples.pinyin: Wǒ qù xué xiào kǎo shì.
examples.english: I go to school to take an exam.

examples.pinyin: Tā ná bǐ xiě dá àn.
examples.english: He picks up a pen to write the answer.

exercises.question: What is a serial verb sentence?
exercises.correct: A sentence with two or more verbs sharing one subject
options: A sentence with two or more verbs sharing one subject
A sentence using 和 to connect verbs

exercises.question: Which sentence is a serial verb sentence?
options: 她去了图书馆，又借了书。

exercises.question: In 我去学校考试, what is the relationship between the two verbs?
exercises.correct: The first verb is the means/method; the second is the purpose
options: The first verb is the means/method; the second is the purpose
They happen at the same time

grammar_points.title: 「把」字句 — The bǎ Sentence
grammar_points.explanation: The 把 (bǎ) sentence is used when the action has a specific effect or result on the object. Structure: Subject + 把 + Object + Verb + Result/Complement. The object must be definite (known). 把 moves the object before the verb to emphasise what happens to it. The verb cannot stand alone — it needs a complement or 了. Example: 他把书看完了 (He finished reading the book).

examples.chinese: 他把第一题的答案写对了。
examples.pinyin: Tā bǎ dì yì tí de dá àn xiě duì le.
examples.english: He wrote the answer to the first question correctly.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ kǎo shì tí zuò wán le.
examples.english: I finished all the exam questions.

exercises.question: When is the 把 sentence used?
exercises.correct: When the action has a specific effect or result on a definite object
options: When the action has a specific effect or result on a definite object
For any sentence with an object

exercises.question: Which sentence is a correct 把 sentence?
exercises.correct_pinyin: Tā bǎ zuò yè zuò wán le.

exercises.question: Fill in: 他___那道错题改对了。(He corrected that wrong question.)
What does 做错了两道题 mean?
option_pinyin: zuò cuò le liǎng dào tí
zuò wán le liǎng dào tí
zuò duì le liǎng dào tí

quiz.question: What does 问题 mean?
What does 考试 mean?
What does 错 mean?
What does 对 mean?
What does 第一 mean?
What does 两 mean?
What does 完 mean after a verb?
What does 题 mean?
Which sentence means 'He doesn't understand anything'?
Which is a correct 把 sentence?
What does 非常 mean?
What does 已经 mean?
What does 知道 mean?
Which sentence uses an interrogative pronoun as an indefinite?
Which sentence means 'I went to school to take an exam' (serial verb)?
How do you say 'got two questions wrong'?
What does 考试非常难 mean?
options: The exam has too many questions

quiz.question: How do you say 'right or wrong'?
What does 知道答案 mean?
Fill in: 这次___非常难，我做___了两道题，___已经改完了。
What does 考试非常难 mean?
What does 知道答案 mean?
What does 对还是错 mean?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这次考试太难了，你做完了吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhè cì kǎo shì tài nán le, nǐ zuò wán le ma?
lines.english: This exam was so difficult; did you finish it?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 做完了，但是我已经错了两道题。
lines.pinyin: Zuò wán le, dàn shì wǒ yǐ jīng cuò le liǎng dào tí.
lines.english: I finished, but I already got two questions wrong.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那里问题太多，问了也没用，我也不知道。
lines.pinyin: Nà lǐ wèn tí tài duō, wèn le yě méi yòng, wǒ yě bù zhī dào.
lines.english: There were too many questions there; asking was useless; I didn't know either.

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Dì yì tí nǐ duì le ma?
lines.english: Did you get the first question right?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 对了，但是我把第三题做错了。
lines.pinyin: Duì le, dàn shì wǒ bǎ dì sān tí zuò cuò le.
lines.english: Yes, but I got the third question wrong.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 下次考试前，大家一起复习吧！
lines.pinyin: Xià cì kǎo shì qián, dà jiā yì qǐ fù xí ba!
lines.english: Before the next exam, let's all study together!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你懂这道题吗？我不知道怎么做。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ dǒng zhè dào tí ma? Wǒ bù zhī dào zěn me zuò.
lines.english: Do you understand this question? I don't know how to do it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我来看看，是哪一道？第一题？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ lái kàn kan, shì nǎ yí dào? Dì yì tí?
lines.english: Let me have a look; which one is it? The first question?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 是的，这道题非常难，我已经做错两次了。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, zhè dào tí fēi cháng nán, wǒ yǐ jīng zuò cuò liǎng cì le.
lines.english: Yes; this question is extremely difficult; I've already got it wrong twice.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没问题，我把答案告诉你。你要把它写对。
lines.pinyin: Méi wèn tí, wǒ bǎ dá àn gào su nǐ. Nǐ yào bǎ tā xiě duì.
lines.english: No problem; I'll tell you the answer. You need to write it correctly.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢，我懂了！我把答案改完就好了。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie, wǒ dǒng le! Wǒ bǎ dá àn gǎi wán jiù hǎo le.
lines.english: Thank you; I understand now! Once I've corrected the answer, it'll be fine.
